title: Siluri umani
director: Antonio Leonviola, Marc-Antonio Bragadin, Carlo Lizzani
writer: Marc-Antonio Bragadin, Franco Brusati, Gian Giacomo Cossa
actors: Raf Vallone, Franco Fabrizi, Andrea Checchi
plot: The Italian Navy attack the British fleet in 1941 when they are anchored in the bay of Suda in Crete.
